Suno.title: Suno AI Downloader
Suno.description: The fastest way to download Suno.ai MP3s.
Suno.descriptionFull: Download AI-generated music for free on mobile or PC. Supports both Suno.ai and Mureka.ai.
Suno.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid Suno.com song URL
Suno.error: Failed to fetch song data. Please check the URL.

guide.title: How to use
guide.step1: Copy the song or playlist link from Suno.ai or Mureka.ai.
guide.step2: Paste it into the input box above and click 'Resolve'.
guide.step3: Click 'Download' in the results list to save the MP3.

free.title: Completely Free
free.desc: Use it for free without any payment or registration required.

unlimited.title: Unlimited Downloads
unlimited.desc: Download as many Suno tracks as you want with no restrictions.

fast.title: Ultra Fast
fast.desc: Getting download links takes only seconds depending on your internet speed.

crossPlatform.title: All Devices Supported
crossPlatform.desc: Works seamlessly on mobile, tablet, PC, and all other devices.

free.q: Is Suno Music Downloader free to use?
free.a: Yes, Suno Music Downloader is completely free. Use it freely without any hidden costs or registration.

limit.a: No, there are no limits on the number of songs you can download. Download unlimited tracks.

mobile.q: Can I use it on mobile devices?
mobile.a: Yes, it works perfectly on mobile, tablet, PC, and all other devices.

location.q: Where can I find downloaded songs?
location.a: Downloaded files are saved to your browser's default download folder.

quality.a: You get the highest quality audio provided by Suno AI.

UnitConverter.title: Unit Converter
UnitConverter.description: Convert between PX, REM, and various Data units seamlessly.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Select the unit type (PX/REM, Data, Length, Weight, Temperature) from the tabs.
guide.step2: Enter the value you want to convert in the left input field.
guide.step3: The converted result appears instantly on the right side.

JsonYaml.title: JSON ↔ YAML Converter
JsonYaml.description: Seamlessly convert between JSON and YAML formats.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Paste your JSON or YAML code in the left input area.
guide.step2: Click the 'Convert' button.
guide.step3: The converted result appears on the right. Use the copy button to copy to clipboard.

JwtDebugger.title: JWT Debugger
JwtDebugger.description: Decode and analyze JSON Web Tokens securely.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Paste your JWT token string into the input area.
guide.step2: The header, payload, and signature are automatically decoded and displayed.
guide.step3: Review claim details such as expiration time, issuer, and more.

VideoConverter.title: Video Editor & Converter
VideoConverter.description: Convert, trim, and extract audio from videos locally in your browser using WASM.
VideoConverter.inputPlaceholder: Drag & drop video file or click to upload

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Drag & drop or click to upload a video file.
guide.step2: Choose an action: Convert, Trim, Extract Audio, or Create GIF.
guide.step3: Adjust settings and click the action button. Processing happens locally in your browser.

SvgToJsx.title: SVG to JSX Converter
SvgToJsx.pasteSvg: Paste your raw SVG code here
SvgToJsx.whyUseDesc: Web standards for SVG attributes are often kebab-case (e.g., stroke-width), but React components require camelCase (e.g., strokeWidth). Manually converting complex SVGs is tedious and error-prone. Our tool handles attribute mapping, removes overhead, and wraps it in a functional component structure so you can just paste it and go.
SvgToJsx.description: Automatically convert SVG code to React JSX components with proper attribute mapping.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Paste your SVG code in the left input area.
guide.step2: Enter a component name and click 'Convert'.
guide.step3: Copy the generated JSX code and use it directly in your React project.

RegexTester.title: RegEx Tester
RegexTester.description: Real-time regular expression testing with highlighting.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Enter your regex pattern at the top and set flags (g, i, m, etc.) as needed.
guide.step2: Type or paste the text you want to test in the test string area.
guide.step3: Matches are highlighted in real-time with detailed match information shown below.

CronGenerator.title: Cron Expression Generator
CronGenerator.description: Create and understand cron schedules easily.
CronGenerator.enterValidCron: Enter a valid cron expression to see upcoming runs.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Enter a cron expression manually or select a preset (every minute, hourly, etc.).
guide.step2: The expression is automatically translated into a human-readable schedule description.
guide.step3: Review the list of upcoming execution times to verify accuracy.

MyIp.title: What is My IP
MyIp.ipDesc: Your public IP address and network details
MyIp.privacyDesc: We do not store or sell your IP data. This information is fetched in real time.
MyIp.description: Check your public IP address with ISP, location, and network details in real time.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Your public IP address is detected automatically when you open this page.
guide.step2: Review network details including ISP, location, and timezone.
guide.step3: Use the copy button to copy your IP or view your location on the map.

BannerGenerator.title: ASCII Banner Generator
BannerGenerator.checkConsole: If this keeps happening, check the console for details.
BannerGenerator.springBootDesc: Use this ASCII art in your Spring Boot banner.txt.
BannerGenerator.description: Convert text into ASCII art banners. Also works as Spring Boot banner.txt.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Enter the text you want to convert into a banner.
guide.step2: Choose a font style and ANSI color to customize the look.
guide.step3: Copy or download the generated banner. You can also use it as a Spring Boot banner.

QrGenerator.title: QR Code Generator
QrGenerator.description: Create customizable QR codes with colors, sizes, and error correction levels. Download as PNG or SVG.
QrGenerator.higherLevelsNote: Higher levels handle more damage but reduce capacity.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Select the content type: URL, Text, Email, or Phone number.
guide.step2: Enter the content and customize colors, resolution, and error correction level.
guide.step3: Download the generated QR code as PNG or SVG, or copy it to clipboard.

BackgroundRemover.title: AI Background Remover
BackgroundRemover.description: Instantly remove backgrounds from images using sophisticated AI. 100% private and locally processed in your browser.
BackgroundRemover.inputPlaceholder: Drop an image here to remove the background
BackgroundRemover.poweredBy: Powered by AI (U-2-Net). Processing happens locally for 100% privacy.
BackgroundRemover.howItWorksDescription: This tool uses the U-2-Net deep learning model running directly in your browser via WebAssembly. It identifies the subject and creates a precise mask to remove the background instantly.
BackgroundRemover.privacyDescription: Unlike other online tools, your photos are processed entirely on your device. We never see, store, or upload your images. It works even when offline!

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Drag & drop or click to upload an image. Supports JPG, PNG, and WebP.
guide.step2: Click 'Remove Background' and the AI will automatically remove the background.
guide.step3: Download the transparent PNG. All processing happens locally in your browser.

ImageEraser.title: AI Image Eraser
ImageEraser.description: Mask a small unwanted area, then run local AI inpainting in your browser. WebGPU is used when available, with WASM fallback for broader compatibility.
ImageEraser.inputPlaceholder: Drop an image here to start masking the area you want to erase
ImageEraser.dropHint: Upload, drag and drop, or paste from your clipboard. Best for logos, badges, stamps, and other small distractions.
ImageEraser.supportedFormats: PNG, JPG, and WebP supported · up to 12MB · all processing stays local
ImageEraser.editorSubtitle: Paint over only the part you want removed. Smaller masks give cleaner and faster results.
ImageEraser.controlsDescription: Choose how you paint the mask, then run one focused inpainting pass on the selected area.

status.idle: Ready for a local erase pass. First run may take longer because the model has to download once.
status.preparing: Preparing crop, mask, and local inference runtime…

ImageEraser.firstRunNote: First run downloads the inpainting model, so the initial erase can take noticeably longer than the next one.
ImageEraser.scopeNote: This v1 works best on small and medium marked regions. It is not positioned as a full Photoshop-style object removal tool.

clipboard.empty: No image found in your clipboard.
clipboard.fallback: Allow clipboard permissions or try Ctrl/Cmd+V directly.

errors.fileTooLarge: Please use an image smaller than 12MB.
errors.noMask: Paint a mask over the area you want to erase first.
errors.canvasUnavailable: Canvas rendering is unavailable in this browser.
errors.generic: Something went wrong while preparing the erase task.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Upload, drag in, or paste an image from your clipboard.
guide.step2: Paint a tight mask over the unwanted logo, stamp, text, or other small distraction.
guide.step3: Run the eraser and download the edited image after the local inpainting pass finishes.

features.title: Why this tool is scoped this way

f1.title: Local-only processing
f1.desc: The image, mask, and inpainting run directly in your browser. Nothing is uploaded to our server.

f2.title: WebGPU first
f2.desc: Modern Chromium browsers use WebGPU when possible, with a WASM fallback for wider device support.

f3.title: Best for small marks
f3.desc: The quality target is small logos, badges, stamps, and similar distractions rather than large scene reconstruction.

Base64Converter.title: Base64 Encoder/Decoder
Base64Converter.description: Convert between text and Base64 in real-time with clipboard support.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Select the Encode or Decode tab.
guide.step2: Enter the text or Base64 string you want to convert.
guide.step3: The result appears in real-time. Use the copy button to save to clipboard.

UrlConverter.title: URL Encoder/Decoder
UrlConverter.description: Safe and fast URL encoding/decoding for developers.
UrlConverter.encodePlaceholder: Type URL or text to encode...
UrlConverter.decodePlaceholder: Paste URL encoded string to decode...

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Select the Encode or Decode tab.
guide.step2: Enter the URL to encode or the encoded string to decode.
guide.step3: Review the result and use the copy button to save to clipboard.

HashGenerator.title: Hash Generator
HashGenerator.description: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512 hashes in real-time.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Enter the text you want to hash in the input area.
guide.step2: MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512 hashes are generated in real-time.
guide.step3: Click the copy button next to any hash value to copy it to clipboard.

SecurityTools.title: Security Tools
SecurityTools.description: Collection of security tools including hash generation and Bcrypt password hashing.

guide.title: How to Use

guide.step2: Enter text or password and click Generate or Verify.
guide.step3: Copy the result for your project. All processing happens locally.

ImageCompressor.title: Image Compressor
ImageCompressor.description: Reduce image size while maintaining quality directly in your browser.
ImageCompressor.introDesc: Upload a PNG/JPG/WEBP and tune quality or scale. You'll see the estimated size savings and can download the compressed result.
ImageCompressor.errorInvalidFile: Invalid file type. Please upload an image.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Drag & drop or select an image file. Supports PNG, JPG, and WEBP.
guide.step2: Adjust quality and scale sliders to fine-tune compression settings.
guide.step3: Check the savings compared to the original and download the compressed image.

BrowserInfo.title: What is my Browser?
BrowserInfo.description: Analyze your browser version, OS, screen resolution, and user agent details.
BrowserInfo.environmentReport: Comprehensive report of your current environment
BrowserInfo.hardwareThreadsDesc: CPU logical cores reported by the browser
BrowserInfo.note: Note: These values are extracted directly from your browser's navigator object and are not stored elsewhere.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Your browser info is automatically analyzed when you open this page.
guide.step2: Review browser, OS, screen resolution, GPU, and privacy settings.
guide.step3: Copy the User Agent string for debugging or compatibility testing.

SpeedTest.title: Network Speed Test
SpeedTest.description: Measure your download, upload, and latency in real time.
SpeedTest.readyDesc: Start the test to measure download, upload, and latency.
SpeedTest.testingMethodologyDesc: Download uses a large file from Cloudflare. Upload sends a fixed payload to estimate throughput.
SpeedTest.jitterDesc: Jitter is variation in latency over time, which affects real-time calls and gaming.
SpeedTest.fiberVs5gDesc: Fiber usually offers lower latency and more stable speeds. 5G can be fast but more variable.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Click 'Start Test' to begin measuring your internet speed.
guide.step2: Download, upload, and latency are measured sequentially.
guide.step3: Review the results to diagnose your network performance.

SqlFormatter.title: SQL Formatter
SqlFormatter.description: Format and beautify complex SQL queries with multiple dialect support.

guide.title: How to Use

guide.step2: Click the 'Format' button.
guide.step3: The formatted SQL appears on the right. Copy it for use in your project.

XmlFormatter.title: XML Formatter & Converter
XmlFormatter.validationDesc: Automatically validates XML structure and reports syntax errors with detailed error messages.
XmlFormatter.formattingDesc: Beautifies XML with proper indentation and line breaks for improved readability.
XmlFormatter.conversionDesc: Converts XML to JSON format while preserving attributes and nested structures.
XmlFormatter.description: Validate and format XML code automatically. Also supports XML to JSON conversion.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Paste your XML code in the input area.
guide.step2: Click 'Format & Validate' to automatically validate structure and format.
guide.step3: Copy the formatted XML or JSON conversion result.

YoutubeThumbnail.title: YouTube Thumbnail Extractor
YoutubeThumbnail.description: Get high-quality thumbnails from any YouTube video URL.
YoutubeThumbnail.errorInvalidUrl: Invalid YouTube URL. Please check and try again.
YoutubeThumbnail.guideDescription: Paste a YouTube URL and click extract to get thumbnails in multiple resolutions.
YoutubeThumbnail.tipsDescription: Some videos don’t provide a max-resolution image. Use high/medium quality in that case.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Paste a YouTube video URL in the input field.
guide.step2: Click the 'Extract Thumbnails' button.
guide.step3: Thumbnails in various resolutions are displayed. Download the one you need.

BoxShadowGenerator.title: CSS Box Shadow Generator
BoxShadowGenerator.description: Create beautiful, multi-layered box shadows visually.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Add shadow layers and adjust offset, blur, and spread values for each layer.
guide.step2: Preview the shadow effect in real-time.
guide.step3: Click 'Copy CSS' to copy the generated code for your project.

Base64Image.title: Base64 Image Decoder
Base64Image.pasteDataUri: Paste your data URI or raw string
Base64Image.invalidBase64: Invalid Base64 string. Please ensure it follows correct format.
Base64Image.noteDesc: Data URIs often include specific mime-types (like image/webp). If your string doesn't include header, we'll attempt to render it as a standard PNG by default.
Base64Image.description: Decode Base64 strings to preview and save images.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Paste a data URI or raw Base64 string in the input area.
guide.step2: Click 'Decode & Preview' to display the image.
guide.step3: Click 'Save' to download the decoded image.

GradientGenerator.title: CSS Gradient Generator
GradientGenerator.description: Create stunning linear, radial, and conic gradients.
GradientGenerator.minStopsError: A gradient needs at least 2 colors.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Select the gradient type (Linear, Radial, Conic) and set the angle.
guide.step2: Add color stops and adjust each color and position.
guide.step3: Click 'Copy CSS' to copy the gradient code. Try 'Randomize' for new combinations.

Glassmorphism.title: Glassmorphism Generator
Glassmorphism.description: Visually generate glassmorphism CSS. Adjust blur, transparency, and more.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Use sliders to adjust blur, transparency, background color, and other glass effect properties.
guide.step2: Preview the glass effect in real-time.
guide.step3: Copy the CSS code of your desired settings and apply it to your project.

FaviconGenerator.title: Favicon Generator
FaviconGenerator.description: Generate a full set of icons for your website from a single image.
FaviconGenerator.formats: Includes: 16x16, 32x32, 48x48, Apple Touch Icon, Android Chrome

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Drag & drop or click to upload an image (512x512 or larger recommended).
guide.step2: Click 'Generate & Download ZIP'.
guide.step3: A ZIP file containing favicons in various sizes (16x16 to 192x192) will be downloaded.

BorderRadiusGenerator.title: CSS Border Radius Generator
BorderRadiusGenerator.description: Visually generate CSS border-radius snippets. Supports 8-point fancy radii.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Adjust the border-radius value for each corner using sliders.
guide.step2: Enable 8-point mode for more complex shapes.
guide.step3: Click 'Copy CSS' to copy the generated border-radius code.

PdfMerge.title: Merge PDF
PdfMerge.description: Combine multiple PDF files into one.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Drag & drop or click 'Add Files' to upload the PDF files you want to merge.
guide.step2: Check the file order and rearrange if needed.
guide.step3: Click 'Merge PDFs' to combine all files into a single PDF and download.

PdfSplit.title: Split PDF
PdfSplit.description: Extract pages from a PDF file.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Drag & drop or click to upload the PDF file you want to split.
guide.step2: Enter the page range to extract (e.g., 1-5, 8, 11-13).
guide.step3: Click 'Split PDF' to extract the selected pages and download.

PdfToImage.title: PDF to Image
PdfToImage.description: Convert PDF pages to JPG or PNG images.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Drag & drop or click to upload the PDF file you want to convert.
guide.step2: Select the output format (JPG or PNG).
guide.step3: Click 'Convert to Images' to convert each page to an image and download.

HwpViewer.title: Document Viewer (HWP/DOCX)
HwpViewer.description: View HWP and DOCX documents directly in your browser without installing any software.
HwpViewer.viewerDescription: Drop a file to preview it instantly. Supports HWP, DOCX, XLSX.
HwpViewer.copyInfo: You can select and copy text from the viewer.
HwpViewer.hwpDisabled: HWP Viewer is temporarily disabled due to build issues.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Drag & drop or click to upload HWP, DOCX, or XLSX files.
guide.step2: The document is rendered and displayed directly in your browser.
guide.step3: You can select and copy text from the viewer.

Basic3dViewer.title: 3D Model Viewer
Basic3dViewer.description: Preview OBJ, STL, and GLTF/GLB files interactively using Three.js.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Drag & drop or upload a 3D model file (OBJ, STL, GLTF/GLB).
guide.step2: Use your mouse to rotate, zoom, and explore the model.
guide.step3: Adjust the view with controls like grid, axes, and auto-rotate.

BcryptGenerator.title: Bcrypt Generator
BcryptGenerator.description: Generate and verify Bcrypt password hashes securely.
BcryptGenerator.generateDesc: Create a secure Bcrypt hash from a password.
BcryptGenerator.roundsDesc: Higher is slower but more secure
BcryptGenerator.verifyDesc: Check if a password matches a Bcrypt hash.
BcryptGenerator.errorVerifyEmpty: Please enter both password and hash

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Generate: Enter a password, set salt rounds, and click 'Generate Hash'.
guide.step2: Verify: Enter a password and Bcrypt hash, then click 'Verify Password'.
guide.step3: Copy the generated hash for use in your database or configuration.

HmacGenerator.title: HMAC Generator
HmacGenerator.description: Create Hash-based Message Authentication Codes using a secret key.
HmacGenerator.errorEmpty: Please enter both secret and message

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Select an algorithm (SHA-256, SHA-512, etc.).
guide.step2: Enter your secret key and the message to hash.
guide.step3: Click 'Generate HMAC' and copy the result.

RsaGenerator.title: RSA Key Generator
RsaGenerator.description: Generate RSA Public and Private Key pairs locally.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Select a key size (2048, 4096, etc.).
guide.step2: Click 'Generate Key Pair' to create public and private keys.
guide.step3: Copy each key for SSH configuration or encryption purposes.

AesCrypto.title: AES Encryption & Decryption
AesCrypto.description: Protect your sensitive data with military-grade AES-256-GCM encryption. All processing happens locally in your browser using the Web Crypto API — your data never leaves your device.
AesCrypto.inputPlaceholder: Enter the text you want to encrypt...
AesCrypto.securityNote: Uses Web Crypto API with AES-256-GCM and PBKDF2 key derivation (100,000 iterations). A unique Salt and IV are generated for every encryption, ensuring the same plaintext produces different ciphertext each time.
AesCrypto.cipherPlaceholder: Paste the encrypted Base64 string here...
AesCrypto.decryptedPlaceholder: Decrypted original text will appear here...
AesCrypto.decryptNote: Decryption successful. The original text has been recovered. Make sure to keep your password safe — there is no way to recover data without it.
AesCrypto.encryptError: Encryption failed. Please check your inputs.
AesCrypto.decryptError: Decryption failed. Incorrect password or corrupted data.
AesCrypto.step1Desc: Your password is transformed into a 256-bit encryption key using PBKDF2 with 100,000 iterations and a random salt.
AesCrypto.step2Desc: The plaintext is encrypted using AES-256 in GCM mode with a random 96-bit IV, providing both confidentiality and integrity.
AesCrypto.step3Desc: Salt, IV, and ciphertext are combined into a single Base64 string for easy sharing. Decryption requires the exact same password.

guide.title: How to Use AES Encryption
guide.step1: Choose 'Encrypt' mode and enter the text you want to protect. Type a strong password (the strength meter helps you gauge quality).
guide.step2: Click 'Encrypt Text' to generate the encrypted Base64 output. Copy the result and share it securely.
guide.step3: To decrypt, switch to 'Decrypt' mode, paste the encrypted text, enter the same password, and click 'Decrypt Text'.

f1.title: AES-256-GCM
f1.desc: Military-grade encryption standard used by governments and financial institutions worldwide.

f2.title: PBKDF2 Key Derivation
f2.desc: 100,000 iterations of PBKDF2-SHA256 make brute-force attacks computationally infeasible.

f3.title: Unique Salt & IV
f3.desc: Every encryption generates random Salt and IV, so the same text always produces different output.

f4.title: 100% Browser-Based
f4.desc: Uses the native Web Crypto API. No data is ever sent to any server — everything runs locally.

f5.title: Password Strength Meter
f5.desc: Real-time feedback on password strength helps you choose a secure key.

f6.title: Base64 Output
f6.desc: Encrypted output is a single Base64 string — easy to copy, paste, and share via any channel.

DataTools.title: Data Tools
DataTools.description: Convert, format, and clean data with JSON, SQL, and slug tools.

JsonConverter.errorEmpty: Please upload a file or enter text

SlugGenerator.inputPlaceholder: Enter text to slugify (e.g. My Blog Post Title)

guide.step2: Enter data or upload a file.
guide.step3: Click convert and copy or download the result.

guide.step3: Review and use the results.

DevTools.title: Developer Tools

DockerConverter.errorEmpty: Please enter a docker run command

BusinessValidator.resWarning: This tool only checks format/checksum validity. It does not verify actual identity.

DevTools.description: Developer utilities including Docker command converter, CHMOD calculator, and validators.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Select the tool you need from Docker, CHMOD, or Validator tabs.
guide.step2: Enter a command, permission settings, or a number to validate.
guide.step3: Review the conversion or validation result and copy it for use.

TorrentHistory.title: Torrent History Check
TorrentHistory.description: Scan your IP address for public torrent download history and security risks.
TorrentHistory.subtitle: See what traces your IP address has left on the public BitTorrent network. This tool queries public DHT databases.
TorrentHistory.notice: * We query public databases. No history is stored.

results.cleanDesc: We couldn't find any torrent activity associated with this IP address in the public databases.
results.cleanWarning: ⚠️ However, dynamic IPs change frequently, so check regularly.
results.vpnDetected: VPN usage detected! You are successfully hiding your location.
results.blockedDesc: Automated scan was blocked by security policy. Please check manually below.

analysis.subnetDesc: Simulated: Metadata queries indicate activity in compatible subnets.

guide.title: Privacy Protection Guide
whyVpnList: Hides your real IP address from public swarms.
Encrypts your traffic from ISP monitoring.
guide.policyDesc: This tool processes data in RAM only. No logs are saved. Your search history disappears when you close this tab.

disclaimer.title: Technical Limitations & Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This tool provides estimated data based on public P2P network DHT (Distributed Hash Table) information. Since most home internet connections (ISPs) use 'Dynamic IPs', the retrieved history might belong to a previous user of this IP address, not necessarily you. This result cannot be used as legal evidence and is for reference purposes only.

PortScanner.title: Port Scanner
PortScanner.description: Scan common ports on a target server to check for open services.
PortScanner.targetDesc: Enter a hostname or IP to scan common services
PortScanner.noScanDesc: Configure a target and press Start Scan to monitor port availability.

legend.openDesc: The service responded and connection was accepted. This usually means an application is listening on this port.
legend.closedDesc: The host responded but explicitly refused connection. No application is currently listening on this port.
legend.filteredDesc: No response was received within the timeout period. This is often caused by a firewall dropping packets.

limitation.title: Note
limitation.content: This tool uses a server-side scanner to check port availability accurately.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Enter the target hostname or IP address to scan.
guide.step2: Click 'Start Scan' to check common ports.
guide.step3: Review Open, Closed, and Filtered statuses to diagnose service availability.

ImageConverter.title: Image Format Converter
ImageConverter.clickOrDrag: Click or drag image to upload
ImageConverter.introDesc: Upload an image and convert it to PNG, JPG, or WebP format. All processing happens locally in your browser—your images never leave your device.
ImageConverter.description: Batch convert images between PNG, JPG, and WebP formats. Processed locally in your browser.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Drag & drop or click to upload the image you want to convert.
guide.step2: Click the desired format button: PNG, JPG, or WebP.
guide.step3: Download the converted image. All processing happens locally in your browser.

SqlConverter.description: Transform SQL INSERT statements into JSON or CSV data formats locally.
SqlConverter.errorInvalidFormat: Could not parse format. Please check your input.

guide.title: How to Use

UuidGenerator.title: UUID Generator

UuidGenerator.v7Desc: UUID v7: Timestamp-based + random (sortable by time)

PasswordGenerator.title: Password Generator
PasswordGenerator.description: Generate secure random passwords with customizable length, characters, and strength meter.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Set the password length using the slider (8-128 characters).
guide.step2: Choose which character types to include: uppercase, lowercase, numbers, symbols.
guide.step3: Click 'Generate Password' and use the copy button to save to clipboard.

UnixTimestamp.title: Unix Timestamp Converter
UnixTimestamp.description: Two-way conversion between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: The current Unix timestamp is displayed in real-time.
guide.step2: Enter a timestamp to convert it to a human-readable date.
guide.step3: Enter a date/time to convert it to a Unix timestamp.

MetaTagGenerator.title: Meta Tag Generator
MetaTagGenerator.description: Generate SEO-optimized HTML meta tags, Open Graph, and Twitter Card code automatically.
MetaTagGenerator.pageDescriptionPlaceholder: A brief description of your page for search engines
MetaTagGenerator.author: Author
MetaTagGenerator.emptyPreview: Fill in the fields above to generate meta tags.
MetaTagGenerator.previewSiteDesc: Your page description will appear here.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Fill in basic meta information like title, description, and keywords.
guide.step2: Add Open Graph tags for Facebook and social media sharing.
guide.step3: Configure Twitter Card tags for Twitter sharing previews.
guide.step4: Copy the generated HTML code and paste it into your page's head section.

RobotsTxtGenerator.title: Robots.txt Generator
RobotsTxtGenerator.description: Create robots.txt files for search engine crawlers with preset templates.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Select a preset template or create custom rules for search engine crawlers.
guide.step2: Add Allow/Disallow paths to control which pages can be crawled.
guide.step3: Optionally add your sitemap URL and crawl delay settings.
guide.step4: Copy or download the generated robots.txt and place it in your site root.

SitemapGenerator.title: Sitemap Generator
SitemapGenerator.description: Add URLs and generate XML sitemap files to improve search engine indexing.
SitemapGenerator.emptyPreview: Add valid URLs above to generate the sitemap XML.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Add your website URLs with the 'Add URL' button.
guide.step2: Set last modified date, change frequency, and priority for each URL.
guide.step3: Copy or download the generated XML sitemap file.
guide.step4: Upload sitemap.xml to your website root and submit it to search engines.

ColorConverter.title: Color Converter
ColorConverter.description: Convert colors between HEX, RGB, and HSL formats with live preview and related colors.
ColorConverter.invalid: Invalid color format. Use HEX, RGB, or HSL.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Enter a color in HEX (#FF5733), RGB (rgb(255,87,51)), or HSL (hsl(11,100%,60%)) format.
guide.step2: Use the color picker or RGB sliders to adjust the color visually.
guide.step3: Copy any converted format and view complementary and analogous colors below.

SubnetCalculator.title: IP Subnet Calculator
SubnetCalculator.description: Calculate network address, broadcast, subnet mask, and usable host range from IP/CIDR.
SubnetCalculator.invalidIp: Invalid IP address. Please enter a valid IPv4 address.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Enter an IPv4 address (e.g., 192.168.1.0) or use CIDR notation (e.g., 192.168.1.0/24).
guide.step2: Adjust the CIDR prefix with the slider or input field.
guide.step3: View calculated subnet details and copy any value to clipboard.

CssMinifier.title: CSS Minifier / Beautifier
CssMinifier.description: Minify or beautify CSS code with size comparison and instant copy.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Paste your CSS code into the input panel on the left.
guide.step2: Click Minify to compress or Beautify to format the CSS.
guide.step3: View the size comparison and copy the result from the output panel.

JsonLdGenerator.title: JSON-LD Schema Generator
JsonLdGenerator.description: Generate structured data (JSON-LD) for SEO easily.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Select a schema type (Article, Product, FAQ, etc.) from the buttons above.
guide.step2: Fill in the fields. The JSON-LD preview updates in real-time.
guide.step3: Copy the generated script tag and paste it into your HTML.

EnvEditor.title: .env File Editor
EnvEditor.description: Edit environment variable files (.env) and compare differences between two files.
EnvEditor.leftPlaceholder:
Paste .env.example contents here...
e.g.: DATABASE_URL=postgres://...
API_KEY=your-key-here

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Paste your .env.example file on the left and .env.local on the right.
guide.step2: Click 'Compare' to see visual differences between the two files.
guide.step3: In edit mode, add, modify, or remove variables and export as .env file.

TomlConverter.title: TOML/INI Converter
TomlConverter.description: Convert between TOML, INI, and JSON formats.
TomlConverter.inputPlaceholder:
Paste TOML, INI, or JSON code here...

Example:
[database]
host = "localhost"
port = 5432
TomlConverter.parseError: Could not parse input. Please check the format.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Paste TOML, INI, or JSON code in the input panel. The format is auto-detected.
guide.step2: Select the desired output format (TOML, INI, JSON) and click 'Convert'.
guide.step3: Copy the result or use 'Swap' to reverse the conversion.

HttpHeaderAnalyzer.title: HTTP Header Analyzer
HttpHeaderAnalyzer.description: Analyze HTTP response headers from any URL and score security header configuration.
HttpHeaderAnalyzer.errorFetch: Failed to fetch headers. Please check the URL.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Enter the URL of the website you want to analyze. https:// is added automatically.
guide.step2: Click 'Analyze' to fetch the HTTP response headers from the URL.
guide.step3: Review security header status and evaluate security level through the score and grade.

WebhookTester.title: API Tester
WebhookTester.description: Send REST API requests directly from your browser and analyze responses with an HTTP client tool.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Select an HTTP method (GET, POST, etc.) and enter the request URL.
guide.step2: Add headers and request body (JSON) if needed.
guide.step3: Click 'Send' to view the response status, headers, and body.

GitDiffViewer.title: Git Diff Viewer
GitDiffViewer.description: Paste git diff or unified diff output to visualize changes with syntax highlighting.
GitDiffViewer.placeholder:
Paste git diff or unified diff output here...

Example:
diff --git a/file.txt b/file.txt
--- a/file.txt
+++ b/file.txt
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 unchanged line
-removed line
+added line
 unchanged line
GitDiffViewer.noValidDiff: No valid diff format found. Please paste git diff output.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Run 'git diff' in your terminal and copy the output.
guide.step2: Paste the diff output in the textarea above. It will be parsed automatically.
guide.step3: Review added/removed lines per file. You can copy individual file diffs.

ExifViewer.title: Image EXIF Viewer & Remover
ExifViewer.description: View and remove EXIF metadata (camera, GPS, date) from images for privacy protection.
ExifViewer.dropTitle: Click or drag image to upload
ExifViewer.dropDesc: Supports JPG, PNG, HEIC, WebP, TIFF
ExifViewer.noExifData: No detailed EXIF data found in this image.
ExifViewer.cleanedNote: Metadata has been stripped. The downloaded image contains no EXIF data.
ExifViewer.privacyDesc: Photos may contain hidden metadata like GPS coordinates, camera info, and timestamps. Remove EXIF data before sharing online to protect your privacy.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Upload an image (JPG, PNG, HEIC) by clicking or drag & drop.
guide.step2: View the extracted EXIF metadata including camera, GPS, and date information.
guide.step3: Click 'Remove EXIF Data' to strip all metadata, then download the clean image.

ImageResizer.title: Image Resizer
ImageResizer.description: Resize images to custom or preset dimensions for social media platforms.
ImageResizer.dropTitle: Click or drag image to upload
ImageResizer.dropDesc: Supports JPG, PNG, WebP, and more
ImageResizer.previewPlaceholder: Resized preview will appear here after processing.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Upload an image by clicking or drag & drop.
guide.step2: Select a preset size or enter custom width and height dimensions.
guide.step3: Choose output format and quality, then click 'Resize Image' and download.

SvgOptimizer.title: SVG Optimizer
SvgOptimizer.description: Optimize and minify SVG files by removing unnecessary data and reducing file size.
SvgOptimizer.inputPlaceholder: Paste your SVG code here or upload a .svg file...

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Paste SVG code or upload a .svg file into the input area.
guide.step2: Toggle optimization options like removing comments, metadata, or minifying.
guide.step3: View the before/after size comparison, preview the result, and copy or download.

ScreenshotBeautifier.title: Screenshot Beautifier
ScreenshotBeautifier.description: Add device frames, backgrounds, and shadows to your screenshots for beautiful exports.
ScreenshotBeautifier.dropTitle: Click or drag screenshot to upload
ScreenshotBeautifier.dropDesc: PNG, JPG, WebP supported. You can also paste from clipboard.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Upload or paste a screenshot image.
guide.step2: Choose a device frame, background style, padding, and border radius.
guide.step3: Preview the result and export as a PNG image.

TextToSpeech.title: Text to Speech (TTS)
TextToSpeech.description: Convert text to natural speech with voice selection, speed, and pitch controls.
TextToSpeech.placeholder: Enter text to convert to speech...
TextToSpeech.notSupported: Speech synthesis is not supported in your browser. Please try Chrome, Edge, or Safari.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Type or paste text into the input area.
guide.step2: Select a voice, adjust speed and pitch to your preference.
guide.step3: Click Play to listen. The current word will be highlighted as it is spoken.

WhoisLookup.title: Domain / DNS Lookup
WhoisLookup.description: Look up DNS records (A, AAAA, MX, NS, TXT, SOA) for any domain name.
WhoisLookup.lookupError: Failed to look up DNS records. Please check the domain and try again.
WhoisLookup.noRecords: No DNS records found for this domain.

guide.title: How to Use
guide.step1: Enter a domain name (e.g. example.com) in the input field.
guide.step2: Click Lookup to query DNS records for the domain.
guide.step3: Browse the categorized results and copy individual records as needed.

ImageCropper.title: Image Cropper
ImageCropper.description: Crop, rotate, and flip images with aspect ratio presets.

guide.title: How to Use Image Cropper
guide.step1: Upload an image by clicking the upload area or dragging and dropping a file (PNG, JPG, WebP).
guide.step2: Draw a crop region by clicking and dragging on the image. Choose an aspect ratio preset (1:1, 4:3, 16:9, etc.) or use free mode. Use the transform buttons to rotate or flip.
guide.step3: Click 'Download Cropped' to save the cropped image as a PNG file. All processing happens locally in your browser.

f1.title: Aspect Ratio Presets
f1.desc: 6 built-in presets: Free, 1:1, 4:3, 16:9, 9:16, 3:2 for quick cropping.

f2.title: Rule of Thirds Grid
f2.desc: Overlay grid helps you compose shots following the rule of thirds.

f3.title: Rotate & Flip
f3.desc: Rotate 90° and flip horizontally or vertically with one click.

f4.title: 100% Local Processing
f4.desc: Your images never leave your browser. No server uploads.

ImageWatermark.title: Image Watermark
ImageWatermark.description: Add text watermarks to your images.

guide.title: How to Use Image Watermark
guide.step1: Upload an image by clicking the upload area or dragging and dropping a file.
guide.step2: Enter your watermark text and adjust font size, opacity, and color. Choose a position (corners, center) or select tile mode for a repeating pattern across the entire image.
guide.step3: Preview the result in real time and click 'Download' to save. The original image is never modified — a new watermarked copy is created.

f1.title: Tiled Watermark
f1.desc: Repeat watermark across the entire image with adjustable rotation angle.

f2.title: 6 Position Options
f2.desc: Place watermark at any corner, center, or use full-tile coverage.

f3.title: Fine-tune Controls
f3.desc: Adjust font size (12-120px), opacity (5-100%), and any color.

f4.title: Non-destructive
f4.desc: Original image stays untouched. A new watermarked copy is created.

guide.title: How to Use Image Filters
guide.step1: Upload a photo by clicking the upload area or dragging and dropping. Supported formats: PNG, JPG, WebP.
guide.step2: Choose a one-click preset (Vintage, B&W, Warm, Cool, Dramatic, Fade, Vivid) or fine-tune individual sliders for brightness, contrast, saturation, blur, grayscale, sepia, hue rotation, and invert.
guide.step3: Click 'Download' to export the filtered image at full resolution. Click 'Reset' to return all adjustments to their default values.

f1.title: 8 One-Click Presets
f1.desc: Vintage, B&W, Warm, Cool, Dramatic, Fade, Vivid — apply instantly.

f2.title: 8 Adjustment Sliders
f2.desc: Fine-tune brightness, contrast, saturation, blur, grayscale, sepia, hue, invert.

f3.title: Live Preview
f3.desc: See filter changes in real-time as you adjust any slider or select a preset.

f4.title: Full Resolution Export
f4.desc: Download the filtered image at the original resolution, not a thumbnail.

CollageMaker.title: Collage Maker
CollageMaker.description: Create photo collages with custom layouts.

guide.title: How to Use Collage Maker
guide.step1: Select a grid layout (2×1, 1×2, 2×2, 3×1, 1×3, or 3×3) from the settings panel, then click 'Add Image' to upload photos for each slot.
guide.step2: Adjust the gap between images, border radius for rounded corners, background color, and output resolution (up to 3000px). Images are automatically cropped to fit each cell.
guide.step3: Click 'Download Collage' to export as a high-quality PNG. You can remove individual images by hovering and clicking the trash icon.

f1.title: 6 Grid Layouts
f1.desc: Choose from 2×1, 1×2, 2×2, 3×1, 1×3, or 3×3 arrangements.

f2.title: Smart Crop
f2.desc: Images are automatically cropped to fit each cell with cover-fit scaling.

f3.title: Custom Styling
f3.desc: Adjust gap, border radius, background color, and export size up to 3000px.

f4.title: Drag & Drop Upload
f4.desc: Add multiple images at once by dragging files into the tool.

MemeGenerator.title: Meme Generator
MemeGenerator.description: Create memes with custom text overlays.

guide.title: How to Use Meme Generator
guide.step1: Upload a base image by clicking the upload area or dragging and dropping. Any image format works.
guide.step2: Type your top and bottom text in the editor panel. Text is automatically displayed in uppercase Impact font. Adjust font size, text color, stroke color, and stroke width to your liking.
guide.step3: Click 'Download Meme' to save as a full-resolution PNG. The text is rendered with a black stroke outline for maximum readability on any background.

f1.title: Classic Impact Font
f1.desc: Bold uppercase Impact text with configurable stroke for maximum readability.

f2.title: Auto Word Wrap
f2.desc: Long text automatically wraps to multiple lines within the image bounds.

f3.title: Color Customization
f3.desc: Choose any text fill color and stroke color with a color picker.

f4.title: High Quality Export
f4.desc: Download at original image resolution — no quality loss or downscaling.

ColorPicker.title: Image Color Picker
ColorPicker.hint: Click anywhere on the image to pick a color

guide.title: How to Use Color Picker
guide.step1: Upload any image (PNG, JPG, WebP). A pixel-level magnifying loupe will appear in the top-right corner as you move your cursor over the image.
guide.step2: Click on any pixel to pick its color. The color is added to the 'Picked Colors' panel with its HEX, RGB, and HSL values. You can pick as many colors as you need.
guide.step3: Click any color value to copy it to your clipboard. Use 'Clear All' to reset picked colors, or the trash icon to start over with a new image.

f1.title: Pixel-Level Loupe
f1.desc: Magnifying glass shows a zoomed grid of pixels around your cursor position.

f2.title: Multiple Picks
f2.desc: Pick as many colors as you need — all saved in the color history panel.

f3.title: 3 Color Formats
f3.desc: Every pick shows HEX, RGB, and HSL values ready to copy.

f4.title: One-Click Copy
f4.desc: Click any color value to instantly copy it to your clipboard.

MarkdownToPdf.title: Markdown to PDF
MarkdownToPdf.description: Write Markdown and export to PDF.

guide.title: How to Use Markdown to PDF
guide.step1: Write or paste Markdown in the left editor panel. Supports headings, bold, italic, lists, tables, code blocks, blockquotes, images, and links.
guide.step2: Preview the rendered output in real time on the right panel. On mobile, switch between Edit and Preview tabs.
guide.step3: Click 'Export PDF' to open a print dialog for saving as PDF. You can also click 'Copy HTML' to get the rendered HTML markup for use elsewhere.

f1.title: Live Preview
f1.desc: Side-by-side editor and preview update in real time as you type.

f2.title: Rich Syntax Support
f2.desc: Headings, bold, italic, lists, tables, code blocks, blockquotes, images, links.

f3.title: PDF Export
f3.desc: Print-to-PDF with beautiful typography, syntax-highlighted code, and styled tables.

f4.title: Copy as HTML
f4.desc: Export the rendered HTML for embedding in websites or email templates.

CsvEditor.title: CSV Editor
CsvEditor.description: Edit CSV data in a spreadsheet-like table.

guide.title: How to Use CSV Editor
guide.step1: Start editing the default sample data directly, or click 'Import CSV' to load your own CSV file. The first row is treated as column headers.
guide.step2: Click any cell to edit its value. Use 'Column' and 'Row' buttons to add new columns and rows. Hover over row numbers or column headers to reveal delete buttons.
guide.step3: Export your data as CSV or JSON using the toolbar buttons. You can also click 'Copy' to copy the CSV content to your clipboard.

f1.title: Spreadsheet UI
f1.desc: Familiar table interface with click-to-edit cells, similar to Excel or Google Sheets.

f2.title: Import & Export
f2.desc: Load CSV files and export as CSV or JSON with proper escaping and formatting.

f3.title: Dynamic Rows & Columns
f3.desc: Add or remove rows and columns on the fly with toolbar buttons.

f4.title: Clipboard Support
f4.desc: Copy the entire CSV content to clipboard with one click.

guide.title: How to Use Code Formatter
guide.step1: Select the programming language (JavaScript, TypeScript, JSON, CSS, HTML, or SQL) from the dropdown menu.
guide.step2: Paste your code in the left panel. Choose indent size (2 or 4 spaces) and toggle semicolons for JS/TS. Click 'Format' to beautify or 'Minify' to compress.
guide.step3: The formatted result appears in the right panel. Click 'Copy' to copy the output to your clipboard. Character counts are shown for both input and output.

f1.title: 6 Languages
f1.desc: Supports JavaScript, TypeScript, JSON, CSS, HTML, and SQL formatting.

f2.title: Configurable Style
f2.desc: Choose indent size (2 or 4), toggle semicolons for JS/TS code.

f3.title: Format & Minify
f3.desc: Beautify code for readability or minify it for production in one click.

f4.title: Character Counter
f4.desc: Track input and output character counts to see compression savings.

PomodoroTimer.title: Pomodoro Timer
PomodoroTimer.description: Stay focused with the Pomodoro technique.

guide.title: How to Use Pomodoro Timer
guide.step1: Click the play button to start a 25-minute focus session. The circular progress ring shows your remaining time. The browser tab title updates with a live countdown.
guide.step2: When the timer ends, a sound alert plays and the timer automatically switches to a break (5 min short break, or 15 min long break after every 4 pomodoros).
guide.step3: Open Settings to customize focus duration, short/long break lengths, and the long break interval. Track your total completed pomodoros and focus minutes in the stats panel.

f1.title: Circular Progress
f1.desc: Beautiful animated SVG ring shows remaining time at a glance.

f2.title: Auto Phase Switching
f2.desc: Automatically transitions between focus, short break, and long break.

f3.title: Session Tracking
f3.desc: Track completed pomodoros, total focus minutes, and progress to long break.

f4.title: Sound Alerts
f4.desc: Audio notification plays when each phase ends. Toggle on/off anytime.

ListSorter.title: List Sorter & Deduplicator
ListSorter.description: Organize text lists by sorting alphabetically, removing duplicates, and cleaning whitespace instantly.
ListSorter.placeholder: Enter your list here, one item per line...

guide.title: How to Use List Sorter
guide.step1: Enter or paste your list into the input area. Each item should be on a new line.
guide.step2: Use the action buttons to sort alphabetically, remove duplicate entries, or clean up whitespace.
guide.step3: The processed list is updated in real-time. Use the 'Copy List' button to save the result.

f1.title: Smart Sorting
f1.desc: Sort lists ascending (A-Z) or descending (Z-A) instantly.

f2.title: Deduplication
f2.desc: Identify and remove duplicate lines with a single click.

f3.title: Cleaning Tools
f3.desc: Trim leading/trailing whitespace and remove empty lines automatically.

f4.title: Real-time Stats
f4.desc: Track item counts and see how many duplicates were removed.

JsonToTypes.title: JSON to TypeScript/Zod
JsonToTypes.description: Automatically generate TypeScript interfaces and Zod schemas from your JSON data with custom naming.

guide.title: How to Use JSON to TypeScript
guide.step1: Paste your JSON object into the input panel on the left.
guide.step2: Choose your target format (TypeScript Interface, Type, or Zod Schema) and set a root name.
guide.step3: The generated code appears instantly on the right. Copy it directly into your project.

f1.title: Multiple Formats
f1.desc: Generate TypeScript Interfaces, Type aliases, or Zod validation schemas.

f2.title: Nested Support
f2.desc: Automatically handles complex nested objects and arrays.

f3.title: Smart Naming
f3.desc: Customizable root name and intelligent property naming.

f4.title: Offline-first
f4.desc: All conversion happens locally in your browser for maximum privacy.

CurlToCode.title: CURL to Code Converter
CurlToCode.description: Convert CURL commands into ready-to-use code for JavaScript Fetch, Axios, Python Requests, and more.
CurlToCode.placeholder:
Paste your curl command here...
Example: curl https://api.example.com/data -H "Authorization: Bearer key"

guide.title: How to Use CURL to Code
guide.step1: Copy a CURL command from your browser's network tab or terminal.
guide.step2: Paste the command into the input box and select your preferred programming language.
guide.step3: Copy the generated code snippet and paste it into your project.

f1.title: Multi-language Support
f1.desc: Convert to JavaScript (Fetch/Axios), Python (Requests), PHP, and more.

f2.title: Header Parsing
f2.desc: Automatically extracts headers, cookies, and authentication tokens.

f3.title: Data Handling
f3.desc: Supports JSON payloads, form data, and query parameters.

f4.title: Instant Conversion
f4.desc: Real-time code generation as you paste or modify the command.

HtmlToJsx.title: HTML to JSX Converter
HtmlToJsx.description: Transform standard HTML code into React-compatible JSX. Automatically handles attribute mapping like class to className.

guide.title: How to Use HTML to JSX
guide.step1: Paste your standard HTML code into the input panel.
guide.step2: The tool automatically converts attributes (class → className, for → htmlFor) and styles.
guide.step3: Copy the React-ready JSX and use it in your components.

f1.title: Attribute Mapping
f1.desc: Automatically converts kebab-case attributes to React's camelCase.

f2.title: Inline Style Conversion
f2.desc: Transforms string-based styles into React style objects.

f3.title: Self-closing Tags
f3.desc:
Ensures all tags like and
are properly closed for JSX.

f4.title: Clean Output
f4.desc: Removes unnecessary HTML comments and formats the resulting code.

MorseConverter.title: Morse Code Converter
MorseConverter.description: Translate text to Morse code and vice versa. Includes audio playback and visual signal support.
MorseConverter.placeholder: Enter text or Morse code (dot . and dash -)...

guide.title: How to Use Morse Converter
guide.step1: Enter English text or Morse code (using . and -) into the input area.
guide.step2: Select the conversion direction and the result will appear instantly.
guide.step3: Listen to the result using the 'Play' button or copy the translated text.

f1.title: Two-way Translation
f1.desc: Seamlessly switch between text-to-morse and morse-to-text.

f2.title: Audio Playback
f2.desc: Hear the morse code sequence with high-quality synthesized beeps.

f3.title: Visual Support
f3.desc: Characters are mapped according to international Morse code standards.

f4.title: Real-time Processing
f4.desc: Translation updates instantly as you type each character.

LoanCalculator.title: Loan & Mortgage Calculator
LoanCalculator.description: Calculate monthly payments, total interest, and view a detailed amortization schedule for different repayment types.

guide.title: How to Use Loan Calculator
guide.step1: Enter the total loan amount, annual interest rate, and the duration of the loan in months.
guide.step2: Choose your repayment method (Equal Principal, Equal Interest, or Lump Sum at maturity).
guide.step3: Review the calculated totals and scroll down to see the month-by-month repayment schedule.

f1.title: Multiple Methods
f1.desc: Supports all major repayment types used by banks and financial institutions.

f2.title: Dynamic Charts
f2.desc: Visual representation of principal vs. interest components over time.

f3.title: Full Schedule
f3.desc: Generates a complete month-by-month breakdown of every payment.

f4.title: Instant Updates
f4.desc: Calculates results immediately as you change any loan parameter.

PassphraseGenerator.title: Passphrase Generator
PassphraseGenerator.description: Generate highly secure yet memorable passwords using random word combinations.

guide.title: How to Use Passphrase Generator
guide.step1: Select how many random words you want to combine (4+ recommended for security).
guide.step2: Choose a separator like a hyphen or dot and customize with capitalization or numbers.
guide.step3: Click generate and copy the resulting passphrase. It's much harder for computers to crack but easier for you to remember.

f1.title: High Entropy
f1.desc: Mathematically more secure than short complex passwords like 'P@ssw0rd123'.

f2.title: Memorable
f2.desc: Uses real English words that create a mental image, making them easier to recall.

f3.title: Customizable
f3.desc: Adjust separators, case, and number additions to fit any site requirements.

f4.title: Local Generation
f4.desc: Passwords never leave your browser, ensuring absolute privacy.

PasswordStrength.title: Password Strength Analyzer
PasswordStrength.description: Evaluate the security of your passwords with entropy analysis and estimated time to crack.

guide.title: How to Use Strength Analyzer
guide.step1: Type or paste a password into the input field. The analysis happens in real-time.
guide.step2: Check the security bar and the time-to-crack estimate (offline vs. online attacks).
guide.step3: Read the suggestions below the meter to learn how to improve your password security.

f1.title: Crack Estimation
f1.desc: Shows how long a standard PC would take to brute-force your password.

f2.title: Real-time Feedback
f2.desc: Visual progress bar changes color from red to green as strength increases.

f3.title: Pattern Detection
f3.desc: Identifies common patterns, sequences, and dictionary words.

f4.title: Privacy First
f4.desc: Your password is never sent to any server; all analysis is done locally.

YamlConverter.title: YAML / JSON Converter
YamlConverter.description: Convert between YAML and JSON formats with ease. Supports nested structures and error highlighting.
YamlConverter.placeholder: Paste your YAML or JSON here...

guide.title: How to Use YAML Converter
guide.step1: Paste your data into the input panel. The tool automatically detects if it's YAML or JSON.
guide.step2: Choose the target format using the toggle buttons above the result panel.
guide.step3: The converted data appears instantly. Click 'Copy' to use it in your project.

f1.title: Auto Detection
f1.desc: Automatically recognizes input format and highlights syntax errors.

f2.title: Two-way Conversion
f2.desc: Seamlessly switch between YAML and JSON representations.

f3.title: Smart Formatting
f3.desc: Outputs clean, indented code for maximum readability.

f4.title: Nested Support
f4.desc: Handles deeply nested objects and arrays without data loss.

TimeZoneConverter.title: Visual Time Zone Converter
TimeZoneConverter.description: Compare times across different cities worldwide. Visual slider to see how time shifts across zones.

guide.title: How to Use Time Zone Converter
guide.step1: Add the cities you want to compare using the search box.
guide.step2: Use the visual timeline slider to shift the time and see how it updates across all selected cities.
guide.step3: Identify the best meeting times across multiple time zones instantly.

f1.title: Visual Timeline
f1.desc: Interactive slider shows time shifts across all cities simultaneously.

f2.title: Global Database
f2.desc: Support for thousands of cities and all international time zones.

f3.title: Meeting Planner
f3.desc: Easily find overlapping working hours between different countries.

f4.title: Local Storage
f4.desc: Your selected cities are remembered for your next visit.

TextSimilarity.title: Text Similarity Checker
TextSimilarity.description: Compare two texts and calculate their similarity percentage using advanced string algorithms.

guide.title: How to Use Similarity Checker
guide.step1: Paste the first text into the 'Original' box and the second into the 'Compare' box.
guide.step2: The similarity percentage is calculated in real-time as you type.
guide.step3: Review the detailed score to see how much the two texts overlap.

f1.title: Levenshtein Algorithm
f1.desc: Uses industry-standard algorithms to measure distance between strings.

f2.title: Real-time Analysis
f2.desc: See the percentage change instantly as you modify either text.

f3.title: Side-by-side View
f3.desc: Compare long documents easily with a synchronized layout.

f4.title: Whitespace Handling
f4.desc: Optionally ignore spaces and line breaks for more accurate matching.

IcoConverter.title: Direct ICO Converter
IcoConverter.description: Convert PNG, JPG, or SVG images directly into .ico favicon files for your website or app.
IcoConverter.dropzone: Drop your image here or click to browse

guide.title: How to Use ICO Converter
guide.step1: Upload a high-quality square image (PNG, JPG, or SVG).
guide.step2: Select the standard icon sizes you want to include in the generated ICO file.
guide.step3: Click 'Download' to get your multi-resolution favicon.ico file.

f1.title: Multi-resolution
f1.desc: Pack multiple sizes (16x16 to 256x256) into a single ICO file.

f2.title: SVG Support
f2.desc: Convert vector graphics directly to crisp icons without loss of quality.

f3.title: No Uploads
f3.desc: All image processing happens locally in your browser for privacy.

f4.title: Transparency
f4.desc: Full support for transparent backgrounds in PNG and SVG sources.

CssPattern.title: CSS Pattern Generator
CssPattern.description: Create beautiful geometric background patterns using only CSS. Copy code for stripes, dots, and grids.

guide.title: How to Use Pattern Generator
guide.step1: Choose a base pattern style from the available presets (stripes, dots, etc.).
guide.step2: Adjust colors, spacing, and rotation to fit your design needs.
guide.step3: Copy the generated CSS background code and paste it into your stylesheet.

f1.title: Pure CSS
f1.desc: No images required; patterns are generated using standard CSS gradients.

f2.title: Live Preview
f2.desc: See how the pattern looks full-screen as you adjust parameters.

f3.title: Infinite Variety
f3.desc: Combine multiple controls to create unique geometric textures.

f4.title: Lightweight
f4.desc: Fast loading backgrounds that don't add weight to your website assets.

SvgVisualizer.title: SVG Path Visualizer
SvgVisualizer.description: Visualize and edit SVG path data (d attribute). See how changes to coordinates affect the drawing in real-time.

guide.title: How to Use SVG Visualizer
guide.step1: Paste the 'd' attribute of an SVG <path> into the input area.
guide.step2: The shape is rendered instantly on the canvas. Adjust points directly in the code.
guide.step3: Use the visual feedback to debug complex vector paths or refine coordinates.

f1.title: Real-time Rendering
f1.desc: Visual representation updates as soon as you type path commands.

f2.title: Coordinate Mapping
f2.desc: Clearly see how M, L, C, and Q commands shape the final vector.

f3.title: Canvas Controls
f3.desc: Zoom and pan the canvas to inspect fine details of the path.

f4.title: Syntax Support
f4.desc: Validates SVG path syntax and provides feedback on errors.

ColorNameFinder.title: Color Name Finder
ColorNameFinder.description: Pick any color to see its closest named match, live HEX/RGB values, and one-click copy support.

guide.title: How to Use Color Finder
guide.step1: Choose a color with the system picker to preview it instantly.
guide.step2: The tool compares your selection against the built-in named color list and shows the closest match.
guide.step3: Copy the HEX value and review the live RGB readout for your selected color.

f1.title: Closest Name Lookup
f1.desc: Matches the selected color against the built-in named color database and surfaces the nearest name.

f2.title: Live Color Readout
f2.desc: See the selected swatch update instantly alongside HEX and RGB values.

f3.title: Quick Selection
f3.desc: Use the native color picker for fast visual exploration without leaving the page.

f4.title: One-Click Copy
f4.desc: Copy the current HEX value to your clipboard with a single click.
